data.keyword: What local counseling options are available in Louisville KY?
data.tag: lmhg ai mode What local counseling options are available in Louisville KY?

result.keyword: What local counseling options are available in Louisville KY?

items.markdown:
Louisville, KY offers a range of local counseling options covering individual therapy, family therapy, and specialized counseling services.[[1]](https://www.compservhealth.com/booking-calendar/psychotherapy-1?utm_source=google&utm_medium=book_button&utm_campaign=Psychotherapy)[[2]](https://counselingnow.com/ky-local-counseling/top-counseling-in-louisville/)[[3]](https://louisvillerecoverycenter.com/mental-health/)

**Individual and Specialized Counseling** 

- **CompServ Health Resources Inc. (Downtown):** Offers individual and group therapy, including Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT).
- **Latoya Hall, LPCC (Original Highlands):** Psychotherapist offering specialized therapy sessions.
- **[Catherine Eleson](https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/therapists/catherine-eleson-louisville-ky/316277) (Louisville, 40213):** Licensed Professional Clinical Counselor specializing in self-worth, relationships, and life choices.[[1]](https://www.compservhealth.com/booking-calendar/psychotherapy-1?utm_source=google&utm_medium=book_button&utm_campaign=Psychotherapy)[[2]](https://www.zocdoc.com/professional/latoya-hall-lpcc-431532?LocIdent=351547&utm_source=reservewithgoogle&utm_medium=seosynd&utm_campaign=hai&entity_id=pr_jLj6ZWUZbki_TjnpRADXYx-lo_LNwrZ_IsUUS3Ix_ED8eI-Q-entity)[[3]](https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/therapists/catherine-eleson-louisville-ky/316277)

**Family and Couples Counseling** 

![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07060028-9766-0139-0000-9497ad2ab9ad:8)
Creative Family Counseling 3.9 (14)  
Marriage or relationship counselor  
Closed 8134 New La Grange Rd #102  
A local practice focusing on family-based therapy.[[1]](https://creativefamilycounseling.org/louisville-ky-campus/)[[2]](https://dragonflymentalwellness.com/resource-guide/)[[3]](https://www.siumed.org/treatment/family-therapy.html)

![](https://streetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com/v1/thumbnail?panoid=av7BdQ-W1bHlMgQm-CCxog&cb_client=search.gws-prod.gps&yaw=38.667984&pitch=0&thumbfov=100&w=82&h=82)
Jim Walker, LCSW 5.0 (4)  
Mental health service  
Closed 6006 Brownsboro Park Blvd Ste A  
Specializes in in-office, phone, or online video therapy for families and couples, costing around 125 USD.[[1]](https://jimwalker.fullslate.com/services/6)[[2]](https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/therapists/live-proud-lgbt-mental-health-svcs-louisville-ky/143009)[[3]](https://www.regain.us/advice/couples-therapy/how-can-online-couples-therapy-offer-relationship-support/)

![](https://streetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com/v1/thumbnail?panoid=1dIJspW4Dit2S2iG8FCknA&cb_client=search.gws-prod.gps&yaw=229.01343&pitch=0&thumbfov=100&w=82&h=82)
Crystal Whittaker, LMFT Psychotherapist  
8139 New La Grange Rd  
Licensed marriage and family therapist for children, adults, and couples.[[1]](https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/therapists/advanced-solutions-counseling-and-consulting-richmond-ky/82564)[[2]](https://www.highlandparktherapy.com/blog/how-to-find-the-best-therapists-in-los-angeles)[[3]](https://www.talkwithmarilyn.com/curriculum-vitae)

![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07060028-9766-0139-0000-9497ad2ab9ad:9)
RoBards Counseling & Consulting, Inc.Marriage or relationship counselor  
Closed 2815 Taylorsville Rd Unit 101  
Offers in-person, 50-minute marriage or relationship counseling sessions.[[1]](https://app.squareup.com/appointments/book/utfyz4199o429i/LPQCJMZ045EAK/start?service_id=GMNV6JG6PNV5QOTZAVR7GSQ3&variation_id=KIVJWN7UH3OCYJCUPWISOPTV)[[2]](https://jrnycounseling.com/individual-therapy/)[[3]](https://www.thecenterforhealthyfamilies.com/services)[[4]](https://www.pivotalcounseling.com/family-counseling-loveland-co)[[5]](https://alpenglowcc.org/services)

**Family Support Services** 

- **[Kentucky Comprehensive Family Services (KCFS)](https://www.chfs.ky.gov/):** Provides comprehensive family-based services, including individual and family therapy, case management, and 24/7 crisis support.[[1]](https://kulimacare.org/)

To help you find the best match, are you looking for **in-person** or **telehealth** sessions, and is this for **an individual**, **couple** , or **family**?
